name: Sarah Jenkins
content: SkillBridge completely changed my learning journey. I learned React from an amazing mentor, and now I am hosting my own introductory CSS course on the platform!

name: Alex Rivera
content: The peer-to-peer approach is brilliant. Mentors explain things in standard student-friendly terms, making learning twice as fast and much more interactive.

name: David Chen
content: I signed up as a mentor to share my Python knowledge. The dashboard makes it super easy to track my students' progress and grade their assignments.
